column1: # We're no longer a self-hosting OS that loads sub-apps. Either:
#   (a) Running as a guest inside bmorcelli's Launcher (his partition
#   (b) Flashed standalone via `pio run -t upload` for direct use.
# For case (b) we only need a single large app partition. Single
# the rest of the 8MB chip after NVS + otadata reservation.
# otadata is kept around because the arduino-esp32 framework expects
# it; it stays empty in the standalone-flash scenario.
